decision.rationale: The plate image successfully honors all cited identity rules. For IR.sean.costume.navy-tee-gray-jeans, Sean is wearing a plain dark navy short-sleeve crew-neck tee with no graphics or logos, sleeves ending mid-bicep, and the collar positioned at the base of the neck, worn over cool-gray jeans. For IR.sean.costume.cuffed-jeans-gray-sneakers, the jeans are cuffed once at the ankle and sit above gray low-top canvas sneakers with distinct white soles and laces. The cuff and sneaker styling are consistent across all full-body views, and the back view shows two back pockets on the jeans as specified.
